863 ROUTE_RSDNT_OTHR_CD ROUTE_RSDNT_OTHR_CD A2124E Patient Trans - Other Methods CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the route(s) of transmission of the current reconciled medication list to the resident/family/caregiver was an other method (e.g., texting, email, CDs) 0=No
